shortAnswer: Anti-Tg antibodies target the thyroid's storage protein and are often measured together with Anti-TPO when an autoimmune thyroid disease is suspected. They're also used after thyroid surgery for follow-up monitoring.
metaDescription: Thyroglobulin antibodies (Anti-Tg) elevated? Meaning for thyroid disease explained.
doctorQuestions: What does this value mean for my thyroid diagnosis?
